description: Per-role IAM profiles: which tools each role may call, which path globs it may touch, and the strictest tier its spend proposals can ever resolve below. Deny by default — a tool or path not explicitly allowed is denied.

coordinator.description: Runs the loop and approves coordinator-tier actions. May not edit the governance config itself.

research-worker.description: Read-only intelligence gathering. Never spends, never writes outside research notes.

content-worker.description: Drafts posts and pages. Never touches code, config, or money.

ops-worker.description: Runs maintenance scripts and proposes infra spend. Proposes — never approves.

globalDeny.description: Secrets are denied to every role. No profile can re-allow them.
